| Check | Result |
| --- | --- |
| Fixed host commands | |
| Test count | |
| `git diff --check` | |
| Current-head Codex P0/P1 review | |

## Safety boundaries

- [ ] No captures, crops, videos, datasets, labels, reports, model files, or weights.
- [ ] No secrets, `.env`, logs, sessions, or runtime state.
- [ ] No automatic click, keyboard input, purchase, reroll, or game control.
- [ ] Linux checks are not presented as Windows capture/OCR/visual proof.
- [ ] Codex did not merge, deploy, or change repository protection.

## Merge and post-merge handoff

- Merge method: squash
- Native auto-merge: not evaluated | eligible | registered
- Deployment required:
- Manual Windows/OCR/visual verification:
- Rollback trigger/owner:
- Remaining risks:
